content: Phase 5 Cycle 3 (§5.4 queue dashboard) implemented — commit 2b755f0. (1) Dashboard: src/bugalizer/static/dashboard.html served at GET / (FileResponse; static page needs no auth — every API call carries the user-entered X-API-Key from localStorage; 401/403 renders a banner). One self-contained file, zero build tooling, vanilla JS fetch-polling every 5s per the locked plan decision. Board = 5 status columns (submitted/triaged/analyzing/fix proposed/terminal, counts from GET /queue; transient+gated states mapped into their nearest column with a status badge). Cards: title, severity chip, project, age, analysis_mode badge when not auto, ⚠ failed-stage badge from list-row failure info. Detail drawer: description, triage result, localization candidates + root-cause, fix proposal diffs, analysis_mode selector (Cycle 2 PATCH), actions = Analyze (local), Analyze (cloud) with two-click confirm on the paid button (deliberately no blocking confirm() dialog), Retry; action errors (409 detail etc.) surface as toasts. Header shows token-usage totals + est. cost (per-provider on hover). (2) API: GET /api/v1/reports extended in place — limit (ge=1 le=500) / offset (ge=0) / order (asc|desc, regex-validated; direction never interpolated from user input), total = pre-pagination count via new db.report_count; every row now carries failed_stage/last_error for the error badge. New read-only GET /reports/{id}/analyses (optional phase filter) feeds the detail view's triage result + failure history — added because no existing endpoint exposed the triage analysis row the plan's detail view requires. db.report_list gained SQL-level LIMIT/OFFSET/ORDER via a shared _report_filter_clause. (3) Packaging: [tool.setuptools.package-data] bugalizer = ["static/*"]. Verified live (uvicorn on :8099): GET / -> 200 text/html; paginated list, analyses endpoint, and the analyze status-guard 409 all behave. Files: main.py, api/reports.py, db.py, static/dashboard.html (new), pyproject.toml, tests/test_api.py (+6: pagination bounds, order+422, failure info in list, analyses endpoint, dashboard route), docs (plan §5.4 checked, architecture.md components, CLAUDE.md). Full suite: 190 passed. Note: end-to-end browser check on real hardware is deliberately the Cycle 4 (§5.5) smoke test per the plan's acceptance split.

Approved. Reviewed Phase 5 Cycle 3 (§5.4) dashboard implementation: root dashboard serving, authenticated API calls from the static page, reports list pagination/order/failure surfacing, analyses detail endpoint, queue/usage/detail/action wiring, package-data inclusion, and updated phase docs. Targeted dashboard/API suite passed: uv run pytest tests/test_api.py -q (47 passed). Full suite passed: uv run pytest -q (190 passed).
